学校层次与声誉.text: During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly positive, mainly due to warm incidents such as a master's graduate thanking the security department for tacitly allowing a scrap collector to enter the campus, demonstrating humanistic care; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 53rd (relatively popular), short video exposure is moderately high, with no obvious negative public opinion or history of admission cutoff gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Grassland Science A+ and Ecology A+ are top-tier disciplines, Chemistry A-, Geography A-, and Biology A- are advantageous disciplines. Enrollment majors such as Grassland Science (Base Class), Ecology (Ecological Informatics Innovation Class), Chemistry (Base Class/Cuiying Class), and Geographical Sciences directly correspond to advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting candidates in related fields; Lanzhou University is a Project 985, Project 211, and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it is approximately 40th, with rankings stable in the 38-40 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 985 universities.

The total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Sichuan Province in 2026 is approximately 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025 (approximately 462,767); based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 61.5%, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in 2026 is about 329,025, an increase of about 44,236 (+15.5%) from 284,789 in 2025, and the significant increase in candidate numbers will intensify competition. 预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline effect of the significant backward shift in rankings in the first year of the new college entrance examination in 2025, the intensified competition due to a substantial increase of about 15.5% in Physics Category candidates in 2026, the alleviating effect of a small enrollment expansion of 4.2%, the slightly positive school reputation, and the attractiveness of advantageous disciplines, it is expected that the lowest admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward (ranking number decreases) compared to 2025. 历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Lanzhou University enrolls medical students separately in Sichuan Province. In 2022, the minimum ranking for medical programs was 4447 (total plan: 29 students), in 2023 it was 3517 (total plan: 36 students), in 2024 it was 3445 (total plan: 33 students), and in 2025 it was 26637 (total plan: 36 students). From 2022 to 2024, due to the inclusion of liberal arts nursing programs, the minimum ranking was lowered to approximately 3500–4500. In 2025, Sichuan implemented the new college entrance examination, requiring all medical programs to have Physics as the first choice and Chemistry as the second choice, and no longer admitting liberal arts nursing students, causing the minimum ranking to jump to 26637 (Physics-based nursing). In 2026, the total enrollment plan for medical programs remains 36 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, so the plan side has no direct downward or upward effect on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Lanzhou University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university under the national '985 Project' and '211 Project', and is selected as a 'Double First-Class' construction university (Category A). As one of the most comprehensive universities in the northwest region, its medical disciplines have a long history and solid foundation. Programs such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology enjoy a high reputation in the region and have stable appeal to Sichuan candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical programs has been rising nationwide, with core programs such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology facing particularly intense competition. As a major college entrance examination province, Sichuan has a sufficient supply of medical students. Although Lanzhou University is located in the northwest, it maintains strong appeal in Sichuan due to its 985 platform and medical discipline strength. In 2026, the medical enrollment plan has not expanded, while the number of Physics candidates in Sichuan is steadily increasing, leading to a tight supply-demand relationship. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking will rise slightly.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the above factors, the minimum admission ranking for Lanzhou University's medical programs in Sichuan Province in 2026 is expected to be around 26837, slightly higher (harder to enter) than the 2025 ranking of 26637, with a fluctuation range of 26569–27105. Candidates with rankings within this range are advised to actively apply, while those slightly below the lower limit may attempt a sprint.
